notes: SEED / INDICATIVE only (feature 026 D5) — best-effort labels for an aggressively one-sided synthetic contract; every clause is risk-worthy, so this doc measures recall/miss but has no clean clauses. Not lawyer-reviewed.

locator.text_snippet: Client shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Provider

clauses.note: one-sided indemnity for any and all claims

locator.text_snippet: Provider may terminate this Agreement at any time, for any reason or no reason
irrevocably assigns to the Provider all right, title, and interest
binding arbitration administered by an arbitrator selected solel
automatically renew for successive one-year terms
keep all terms of this Agreement strictly confidential in perpetuity
governed by the laws of a jurisdiction to be designated by the Provider at its sole discretion
